Class Debug

java.lang.Object
recoder.util.Debug
public class Debug extends Object
Routines to debug.

  • Field Details

    • NEGATIVE_VALUES

      protected static final String[] NEGATIVE_VALUES
      Strings that are regarded as having a somewhat negative touch. Options with these values (or uppercase versions thereof) are considered unset.

    • DEBUGGING_OPTION_FILE

      protected static final String DEBUGGING_OPTION_FILE
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • level

      protected static int level
      Information level. Lower levels are higher.

    • output

      protected static PrintStream output
      The print writer output stream.

  • Constructor Details

    • Debug

      public Debug()

  • Method Details

    • getDebuggingOptions

      protected static Properties getDebuggingOptions()

    • isSet

      protected static boolean isSet(Properties prop, String key)
      Finds out whether the properties contain a key with the given name and whether it is set to a positive value. Positives values are everything but "", "0", "false", "off", "no", "none".

    • isSet

      public static boolean isSet(String key)

    • getLevel

      public static int getLevel()
      Gets current debug output detail level.

    • setLevel

      public static void setLevel(int level)
      Sets current debug output detail level.

    • setOutput

      public static void setOutput(PrintStream s)

    • println

      public static void println(String option, String printoutString)
      Print out a string if it the option is set. At first call, read the properties from file .recoderrc.

    • printlno

      public static void printlno(String option, String printoutString)
      Print out a string if it the option is set. print the option string also.

    • setOption

      public static void setOption(String key, String value)
      Sets a property in the debugging option table.

    • error

      public static void error(String error)
      Prints an error (always).

    • restriction

      public static void restriction(String restriction)
      Prints an implementation restriction (always).

    • log

      public static void log(String info)
      Prints a message (always).

    • info

      public static void info(String info)
      Prints an information (always).

    • info

      public static void info(int level, String info)
      Prints an information, depending on level.

    • assertBoolean

      public static final void assertBoolean(boolean expression)
      Assertion method for general conditions.
      Parameters:
      expression - predicate that must hold.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the expression evaluates to false.

    • assertBoolean

      public static final void assertBoolean(boolean expression, String message)
      Assertion method for general conditions.
      Parameters:
      expression - predicate that must hold.
      message - detail message.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the expression evaluates to false.

    • assertNonnull

      public static final void assertNonnull(Object nonnull)
      Special assertion method to test for invalid objects.
      Parameters:
      nonnull - object that may not be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the object is null.

    • assertNonnull

      public static final void assertNonnull(Object nonnull1, Object nonnull2)
      Special assertion method to test for invalid objects.
      Parameters:
      nonnull1 - object that may not be null.
      nonnull2 - object that may not be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the object is null.

    • assertNonnull

      public static final void assertNonnull(Object nonnull1, Object nonnull2, Object nonnull3)
      Special assertion method to test for invalid objects.
      Parameters:
      nonnull1 - object that may not be null.
      nonnull2 - object that may not be null.
      nonnull3 - object that may not be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the object is null.

    • assertNonnull

      public static final void assertNonnull(Object nonnull1, Object nonnull2, Object nonnull3, Object nonnull4)
      Special assertion method to test for invalid objects.
      Parameters:
      nonnull1 - object that may not be null.
      nonnull2 - object that may not be null.
      nonnull3 - object that may not be null.
      nonnull4 - object that may not be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the object is null.

    • assertNonnull

      public static final void assertNonnull(Object nonnull, String message)
      Special assertion method to test for invalid objects.
      Parameters:
      nonnull - object that may not be null.
      message - detail message.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the object is null.

    • makeStackTrace

      public static final String makeStackTrace()
      Receives a string with a stack trace for the caller of this method. The implementation assumes that the output format of Throwable.printStackTrace does not change in future versions of the JDK. The resulting string contains no exception name and does not end with a linefeed.

    • getUsedMemory

      public static final long getUsedMemory()
      Returns the amount of memory used by the virtual machine. Generational garbage collectors might obscure the result; therefore, the garbage collector is run until only minor changes are observed.
